body_txt: A very common and easy to spot form of Theme Naming is the use of common or similar letters, or patterns of letters. This includes such things as names which begin or end with the same letter and names in alphabetical order. Compare with Alliterative Family , Rhyme Theme Naming , Theme Initials , Theme Twin Naming , Letter Motif , or One-Letter Name . See also Alliterative Name . Often appears in examples of Alice and Bob (making up hypothetical characters to explain something).
